pr.title: Non-record: state-space hybrid with attention anchors

output.summary: Hybrid AASSSASSS stack mixes attention anchors with compile-friendly S4D-style SSM blocks while exporting ssm.* tensors in float16.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard fixed-step training with full validation split; not a validation-only regime.
techniques: Hybrid layout combining early attention anchors with S4D-style state-space blocks
Export policy keeping ssm.* tensors in float16 to meet size constraints
